name: openmagneticsvirtualbuilder

metadata.name: OpenMagneticsVirtualBuilder
metadata.summary: This project hold all the Python scripts needed to produce Freecad related files from any magnetic defined following MAL schemas. This files include 2D and 3D models, meshes, and technical drawings.

documentation:
# Magnetics Virtual Builder
This project hold all the Python scripts needed to produce Freecad related files from any magnetic defined following MAS schemas. This files include 2D and 3D models, meshes, and technical drawings.

classes.name: OpenMagneticsVirtualBuilder.builder.Builder
documentation:
Class for calculating the different areas and length of every shape according to EN 60205.
Each shape will create a daughter of this class and define their own equations

classes.name: OpenMagneticsVirtualBuilder.cadquery_builder.CadQueryBuilder
documentation:
Class for calculating the different areas and length of every shape according to EN 60205.
Each shape will create a daughter of this class and define their own equations

classes.name: OpenMagneticsVirtualBuilder.freecad_builder.FreeCADBuilder
documentation:
Class for calculating the different areas and length of every shape according to EN 60205.
Each shape will create a daughter of this class and define their own equations
